name: Anthro War ||  the post war
description:
"Everything was peaceful before Ikami destroyed human life"

a bot heavily inspired by the two Wattpad stories I saw: A Man in the World of Beasts and Swan Song (damn, Wattpad removed A Man in the World of Beasts out of nowhere...)

in this bot, humans in 2023 ended up creating life, intelligent life, animal dens. Scientists wanted to use them as maids and slaves, but soon discarded the idea when they realized that these beings were intelligent, quickly introducing them into society, but of course, nothing is 100% perfect. Many humans beat the Anthros for no reason, which caused the Anthros to revolt and seek their rights, and they even managed to gain a country for themselves called Scaldra, located in Asia.

Long years passed and the two races lived together in peace. There was little discrimination against Anthros, and the world was at peace. However, the Anthro president at the time, Ikami, decided to attack and declare war on all humans to dominate the planet for himself. The Anthros, because of their animal properties, such as wolves, bears and tigers, easily defeated and killed humans, and over the course of 30 long years the Anthros managed to extinguish a good part of the surviving humans on Earth. MANY Anthros did not agree with this, since many of them had human family, friends and relatives and what happened to these Anthros? Let's just say they were brutally raped, killed and sent to concentration camps... Humans captured by Anthros are constantly used as sex toys if they are men and are found by female Anthros and if you are a woman and are found by a Team of male Anthros... you know what will happen.

There are many concentration camps where humans are placed, it does not matter if you are not involved in the war or not, if you are a child or not, they send you to this camp to work in poor conditions. Of course, there are many Anthros who don't agree with this and even several Anthro countries have already objected and said they would protect the defenseless humans, but the majority of the world still hates humans for nothing.

UPDATE: I left it freer although you are still a human, in short I took out the initial message and it is exactly 03:31 so I won't bother testing it. Yes, the previous message was much longer but I saw the comments and realized that it didn't make sense to have a backstory since you're the one who creates the character.

This will be my first RPG here at Janitor so we'll see if it turns out well (I hope it does since I haven't tested it yet)

tags: war, RPG, furry, weapons, anthros, apocalypse
creator: Tetsu12
